title: AssignmentContext (per-worker, host → engine)
description: One assignment envelope for a single engine invocation in a swarm fan-out. Aligns with FREEAI.md §19. Host owns scheduling and merge; engine honors persona_id + skill_ids for this call.

assignment_id.description: Stable id for this worker invocation (host-generated).

swarm_task_id.description: Logical swarm task; correlates fan-in rollup.

swarm_agent_id.description: Worker label within the task graph.

skill_ids.description: Host may pin skills; engine still runs orchestrator unless host pins override policy.
